steps.t: Théodred is waiting to address his assembled men, and you should speak with him.
Prince Théodred has asked you and Grimbold to cut through the brush on the eastern side of the road to attack the half-orc flank.
Rungar has arrived on the flank of the main host, and you should speak with him.
Before the gates of Isengard, the Rohirrim led by Théodred have come under attack by an overwhelming force of Saruman's uruks. You need to speak with …
